neon_glow.description: Ethereal outer glow effects for tech accents.

primary_button.description: Main CTA with gradient and glow.

timeline_node.description: Glowing dot on a vertical line.

navigation.behavior: Blur background, horizontal scroll for section links, dark/light toggle icon on right.
navigation.progress_bar: Absolute positioned at bottom of header, height 3px, width driven by scroll offset.

hero_section.layout: Centered content with asymmetrical background elements.
elements: Portrait Image: Inside a circular frame with border-radius: 9999, border-width: 2, neon glow, and slow floating animation (translateY).
Role Text: Typing animation iterating through ['B.Tech CSE Student', 'Machine Learning Enthusiast', 'Software Developer'].
Social Row: Contact (mailto), GitHub, LinkedIn Icon buttons.
Highlight keywords like 'B.Tech CSE & ML', 'Autonomous' with primary color.
Dadi Institute of Engineering & Technology, B.Tech CSE & ML, CGPA, Duration, Location.
Each group has an H4 title.
Flex wrap row of Tech Chips with glowing borders.

projects_section.layout: Vertical list of cards or Horizontal Carousel.
elements: Glassmorphic Card with Title, Description, Tech Chips row, GitHub Link button.
Left vertical line with neon glow.
5 nodes with glowing dots connected to the line.
Card per internship positioned to the right of the line.

certifications_section.layout: Horizontal ScrollView with snap-to-interval or Grid.
elements: 8 items, rendered as glassmorphic animated cards.
Bullet points replaced with custom neon icons (e.g., Star/Trophy), separated by subtle dividers.
Floating Action Button (FAB) for 'Back to top' at bottom-right.

motion.floating_icons: Use Animated.loop with sequence of Animated.timing to translateY up and down smoothly.
motion.typing_animation: Use state to substring text over intervals (e.g., 100ms per character).
motion.particles: Randomly placed absolute views moving slowly with reanimated.
motion.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 on onPressIn, return to 1 on onPressOut.

accessibility.test_ids: All buttons, inputs, links, and cards MUST have unique testID (e.g., testID='hero-view-resume-button').
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum touch area of 48x48 via hitSlop or explicit dimensions.
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over gradients has sufficient contrast (use textShadow for readability if needed).

instructions_to_main_agent: Develop using React Native and Expo.
Use JS files (.js/.jsx) as requested. Do NOT use .tsx.
Create a ThemeContext to handle Dark/Light mode toggling smoothly.
Use standard React Native StyleSheet for styling.
Use expo-blur for Glassmorphism if possible, otherwise simulate with semi-transparent rgba and borders.
Implement the Hero section portrait exactly as requested: glowing circular frame with floating animation. Use the provided portrait URL.
Ensure 'Download Resume' links to the provided PDF URL.
Implement the vertical timeline for Internships manually using Views and borders.
Floating back-to-top button should use absolute positioning and react to ScrollView offset.
Include scroll progress bar mapped to ScrollView's contentOffset.y.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this by using deep contrasting colors, distinct layered shadows, and glassmorphic overlays.
Do not use dark colors as gradients (except intentionally for mood). Combine with vibrant accents.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical spacing where possible to create visual interest.
Never use pure transparent backgrounds for nav/headers where content scrolls underneath. Always add blur or a semi-solid tint.
Every interactive element needs micro-interactions (opacity change or scale on press).
Always use the provided exact portrait URL and resume URL.
No fake stats or invented content. Use exactly what is provided in the problem statement.
All interactive elements MUST include a testID attribute.
